title: E. coli Heat Shock Transformation
steps: Combine 1-5μl of DNA (10pg - 100ng) into 50μL of competent cells in a microcentrifuge tube. Flick the bottom of the tube with your finger a couple of times to mix.
Incubate cell/DNA mixture on ice for 20-30min.
Place transformation tube into a 42°C water bath for 42 seconds (30-60 sec).
Return tube to ice for 2 min.
Add 500μl LB medium, grow in 37°C shaking incubator for 1 h.

Plate transformation on LB agar plates containing the appropriate antibiotic. Often e.g. 50 uL on one plate and 200 uL on another gives a good chance of single colonies. The rest of the transformation can be left on the benchtop overnight and plated the next day if needed.
creator: Snehadri Sinha
